models.name: NovaPharm Evidence Vector
models.task: Deterministic sparse lexical-semantic embedding for approved public evidence retrieval
models.commercialUseStatus: Permitted for NovaPharm-owned public and internal applications
models.quantisation: Sparse normalised decimal vectors; no neural weights or WASM
models.redistributionRight: Repository and generated asset may be distributed as part of NovaPharm's website
models.modificationRight: NovaPharm may modify and version its own implementation
restrictions: No medical, patient, safety or autonomous regulated decision use
Similarity does not establish factual truth or regulatory status
models.securityStatus: No executable model weights; deterministic source-reviewed code; public corpus only
models.updatePolicy: Any vocabulary, algorithm or dimension change requires a revision, rebuilt corpus, benchmark and licence review

models.name: Internal AI provider disabled
models.task: Production-safe default that prevents a generative provider invocation
models.updatePolicy: Must remain the default until an approved provider, model and use case are configured

models.name: Ollama loopback development adapter
models.task: Optional local draft generation after deterministic retrieval
models.softwareLicence: Adapter is NovaPharm-owned; Ollama and each selected model require separate licence review
models.modificationRight: Adapter may be modified; model rights are model-specific
models.securityStatus: Development adapter implemented; activation requires owner decision and model review
models.updatePolicy: Pin and review any future local model before use
